CREATE TABLE timestamps (start_time TIMESTAMP, end_time TIMESTAMP);
SELECT start_time, end_time, timestampdiff_year(start_time, end_time) AS year_diff FROM timestamps WHERE year_diff > 2;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(timestampdiff_year(start_time, end_time)) FROM timestamps) AS max_year_diff;
SELECT t1.start_time, t1.end_time, timestampdiff_year(t1.start_time, t2.end_time) FROM timestamps t1 INNER JOIN timestamps t2 ON t1.start_time < t2.end_time;
CREATE TABLE nested_timestamps (nested_start TIMESTAMP, nested_end TIMESTAMP);
SELECT (SELECT timestampdiff_year(nested_start, nested_end) FROM nested_timestamps) - (SELECT SUM(timestampdiff_year(start_time, end_time)) FROM timestamps) AS difference;
CREATE TABLE more_timestamps (col1 TIMESTAMP, col2 TIMESTAMP);
SELECT timestampdiff_year(t1.col1, t2.col2) FROM more_timestamps t1, more_timestamps t2 WHERE t1.col1 < t2.col2;
